_about: Personal OdinRAG config. Copy this file to _Helpers/.private/user_config.json and fill in your values. The .private/ folder is gitignored - this file stays local.
_how_to_use: 2. Edit the copy with your actual paths and credentials
3. Set SKOOL_PASSWORD as an env var (NEVER commit passwords)
4. Restart your scripts - they read this file on every call
_fallback_chain: Each value is read in this order: (1) env var if listed, (2) this JSON, (3) empty string. Scripts that get an empty string will warn you at startup.

paths._comment: Absolute paths to your local tools and source files. Use forward slashes or double backslashes in JSON strings.
paths._karl_book_out_note: If empty, _Helpers/book_html_to_md.py uses a path relative to the repo root.
paths._external_odin_projects_dir_note: Where you clone + build Odin projects (this repo is NOT a build target).

skool._comment: Skool credentials for scrape_skool.py. PASSWORD must NEVER live in this file - use the SKOOL_PASSWORD env var.
skool._password_note: Set this env var in your shell, NOT in this JSON. Example: $env:SKOOL_PASSWORD='your-password' on PowerShell.

scraper._youtube_cookies_file_note: Path to a Netscape-format cookies file to bypass YouTube bot checks. Leave empty if not using --download-video.

kb._comment: Optional expected counts (purely informational). Populate after your first scrape to help the INDEX.md table stay accurate.
